title: Bob Iger rejoins Thrive Capital as advisor after Disney exit
summary: Bob Iger, the former Disney CEO, is returning to Thrive Capital as an advisor, a firm in which he already holds a stake and previously worked as a venture partner. This move comes after his exit from Disney and signals his continued involvement in the venture capital space.
content: The former Disney CEO hold a stake in Thrive, and has previously held the role of the venture partner at the firm.

zh.title: Bob Iger在迪士尼离职后重新加入Thrive Capital担任顾问
zh.summary: 前迪士尼首席执行官Bob Iger正在以顾问身份重新加入Thrive Capital，这家公司他已持股且曾担任创投合伙人。此举发生在他离开迪士尼之后，表明他继续参与风险投资领域的意愿。
